name: Longhorn Merit Scholars Award
description: University-wide merit scholarship for high-performing undergraduates who show consistent academic growth and campus engagement.
submissionDetails: Submit the central scholarship form and a one-page personal statement through Texas One Stop.

name: First-Gen Forward Scholarship
description: Supports first-generation undergraduates navigating college access and completion at UT Austin.
submissionDetails: Complete FAFSA/TASFA on file plus one short essay on educational journey.

name: UT STEM Innovation Grant
description: Award for STEM students building practical technical projects with measurable impact.
eligibilitySignals: Majors: computer science,electrical engineering,mechanical engineering,biomedical engineering,data science,mathematics
submissionDetails: Upload resume, unofficial transcript, and project portfolio link.

name: Texas Public Service Scholarship
description: Recognizes students committed to public-sector, nonprofit, or policy-driven careers.
submissionDetails: Essay and service activity list required; one faculty reference optional.

name: Transfer Student Rising Award
description: Supports transfer students who quickly establish strong academic standing at UT.
submissionDetails: Submit transfer statement and updated resume via departmental scholarship portal.

name: AI Research Fellows Scholarship
description: Competitive award for students pursuing AI and machine learning research pathways.
submissionDetails: Resume, transcript, and research statement required. Faculty recommender required.

name: Women in STEM Momentum Scholarship
description: Supports women and nonbinary students advancing representation in STEM fields.
eligibilitySignals: Majors: computer science,electrical engineering,mechanical engineering,chemical engineering,biology,chemistry
submissionDetails: Short essay and one extracurricular impact example required.

name: Student Builder Entrepreneurship Scholarship
description: For students building products, ventures, or social startups while enrolled at UT.
submissionDetails: Pitch deck or product brief required with optional demo video.

name: Global Leaders Study Support Scholarship
description: Provides support for students preparing for global internships and study programs.
submissionDetails: Statement of purpose plus intended program budget estimate.

name: Data for Good Scholarship
description: Award for students applying data analysis to education, health, civic, or social outcomes.
submissionDetails: Resume and one project case study required.

name: NSF S-STEM Scholars Grant
description: External NSF funding for high-achieving STEM students with documented financial need.
submissionDetails: FAFSA evidence, transcript, and faculty recommendation required.

name: Texas Higher Education Coordinating Board Grant
description: State-supported grant for Texas residents with demonstrated financial need and satisfactory academic progress.
submissionDetails: FAFSA/TASFA required. Submit enrollment plan through financial aid portal.

name: Society of Women Engineers Scholarship
description: External SWE scholarship for engineering and computing students showing technical promise and community leadership.
eligibilitySignals: Majors: computer science,electrical engineering,mechanical engineering,civil engineering,biomedical engineering
submissionDetails: SWE application, transcript, and two short responses required.

name: Hispanic Scholarship Fund Award
description: National scholarship supporting Hispanic students in undergraduate and graduate pipelines.
submissionDetails: HSF profile, transcript, and identity/eligibility verification required.

name: Senior Capstone Completion Scholarship
description: Helps seniors finish capstone-heavy final year requirements without financial disruption.
submissionDetails: Submit degree completion plan and faculty capstone verification.

name: Undergraduate Research Start Scholarship
description: Supports students entering research for the first time with faculty-supervised projects.
submissionDetails: Research interest statement and tentative faculty mentor required.
